title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Department of Social Welfare and Development DSWD) Regarding Specific Implementation Agreement for the Pantawid Pamilyang Pilipino Program (4PS?) and Ratifying the Same There After. (AUTHOR: HON. MIKO C. PELEGRINA, 03/22/2021)
